interfaces.name: autocompletePlace
interfaces.description: Search for places using a free-text query for pickup, drop-off, and stops with address autocomplete.

parameters.name: query
parameters.description: Text to search for, e.g., '123 Maple', 'City Airport Terminal 1'.

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Maximum number of suggestions to return.

interfaces.name: getImmediateBookingFormData
interfaces.description: Get initial data for the homepage immediate booking form, including defaults and saved places.

defaultPickupDatetime.description: Suggested pickup datetime in ISO format for 'now' rides.

interfaces.name: searchImmediateRides
interfaces.description: Create or update the current ride search for an immediate ride and return initial ride options.

parameters.name: pickupPlaceId
parameters.description: Selected pickup place.

parameters.name: dropoffPlaceId
parameters.description: Selected drop-off place.

parameters.name: stopPlaceIds
parameters.description: Optional ordered list of intermediate stop place ids between pickup and final destination.

parameters.name: pickupDatetime
parameters.description: Desired pickup datetime in ISO format, usually within the next few minutes for 'now' rides.

parameters.name: passengerCount
parameters.description: Number of passengers for this ride.

rideSearchId.description: Identifier of the internally managed ride search.

interfaces.name: getScheduledRideFormData
interfaces.description: Get initial data for the scheduled ride booking form (Schedule Ride page), including defaults and saved places.

defaultPickupType.description: Default pickup type for this page, usually 'scheduled'.

earliestSchedulableDatetime.description: Earliest datetime that can be scheduled.

latestSchedulableDatetime.description: Latest datetime that can be scheduled.

defaultPickupDate.description: Suggested default date (e.g., today or tomorrow) in ISO date format.

defaultPickupTime.description: Suggested default time string such as '08:00'.

interfaces.name: searchScheduledRides
interfaces.description: Create or update the current ride search for a scheduled ride and return initial ride options.

parameters.name: pickupPlaceId
parameters.description: Selected pickup place.

parameters.name: dropoffPlaceId
parameters.description: Selected drop-off place.

parameters.name: pickupDatetime
parameters.description: Scheduled pickup datetime in ISO format (future).

parameters.name: passengerCount
parameters.description: Optional passenger count for the scheduled ride.

interfaces.name: getRideOptionFilterOptionsForCurrentSearch
interfaces.description: Get available filter and sort options for the current ride search based on available vehicle types.

vehicleCategories.description: Vehicle category filters such as economy, standard, sedan, minivan_xl, premium.

passengerCapacityOptions.description: Distinct seating capacity options available in this search.

accessibilityOptions.description: Accessibility filters supported for this search.

interfaces.name: getCurrentRideOptions
interfaces.description: Get the list of ride options for the current ride search, after any filters, promo codes, or sorting have been applied.

appliedPromoCode.description: Promo code applied to this search, if any.

interfaces.name: updateRideOptionsFilters
interfaces.description: Update vehicle category, passenger capacity, and accessibility filters for the current ride search and return updated ride options.

parameters.name: rideCategoryFilter
parameters.description: Filter by vehicle category such as economy, standard, sedan, minivan_xl, premium, or all.

parameters.name: minPassengerCapacity
parameters.description: Filter to vehicles that can seat at least this many passengers.

parameters.name: accessibilityFilter
parameters.description: List of accessibility requirements, e.g., ['wheelchair_accessible'].

interfaces.name: applyPromoCodeToCurrentSearch
interfaces.description: Apply a promo code to the current ride search and return updated ride options and pricing.

parameters.name: promoCode
parameters.description: Promo code text such as 'OFFICE10'.

interfaces.name: sortCurrentRideOptions
interfaces.description: Change the sort option for the current ride search and return the re-ordered list of ride options.

parameters.name: sortOption
parameters.description: Sorting criteria such as price_low_to_high or rating_high_to_low.

interfaces.name: chooseRideOption
interfaces.description: Select a specific ride option for booking and create a booking draft for passenger details.

parameters.name: rideOptionId
parameters.description: Ride option chosen by the user from the list.

bookingDraftId.description: Identifier of the internally managed booking draft created from this selection.

interfaces.name: getCurrentBookingSummary
interfaces.description: Get a concise summary of the current booking draft before collecting passenger details and payment.

stops.description: Intermediate stops, if any, in visit order.

allowedPaymentMethods.description: Payment methods available for this booking.

interfaces.name: confirmCurrentBooking
interfaces.description: Confirm the current booking draft with passenger details and payment method, creating a Trip.

parameters.name: passengerName
parameters.description: Passenger name to show to the driver.

parameters.name: passengerPhone
parameters.description: Optional passenger phone number for contact.

parameters.name: paymentMethod
parameters.description: Selected payment method for this ride.

parameters.name: cardDetails
parameters.description: Required if paymentMethod is 'card'.

interfaces.name: getSavedPlaces
interfaces.description: List all saved places (e.g., Home, Work) for the current user with their address details.

interfaces.name: addSavedPlace
interfaces.description: Add a new saved address with a user-friendly label and an existing Place selected via autocomplete.

parameters.name: label
parameters.description: Label for this saved place such as 'Home' or 'Work'.

parameters.name: placeId
parameters.description: Place to save under this label.

parameters.name: isFavorite
parameters.description: Whether this address should be prioritized in suggestions.

interfaces.name: updateSavedPlace
interfaces.description: Edit an existing saved place to change its label or underlying address.

parameters.name: savedPlaceId
parameters.description: Saved place to update.

parameters.name: label
parameters.description: Updated label for this place.

parameters.name: placeId
parameters.description: Updated Place id if the address changed.

parameters.name: isFavorite
parameters.description: Updated favorite flag.

interfaces.name: deleteSavedPlace
interfaces.description: Delete a saved place that is no longer needed.

parameters.name: savedPlaceId
parameters.description: Saved place to delete.

interfaces.name: getTripsList
interfaces.description: Get a list of trips for the My Trips page, filtered by upcoming or past rides.

parameters.name: group
parameters.description: Which trips to return: 'upcoming' for future rides, 'past' for completed and cancelled rides.

canModify.description: Whether this trip can be modified (usually upcoming only).

canCancel.description: Whether this trip can be cancelled (usually upcoming only).

interfaces.name: getTripDetails
interfaces.description: Get full details for a specific trip, including route, scheduled time, vehicle class, fare, discounts, and payment method.

parameters.name: tripId
parameters.description: Trip to display details for.

interfaces.name: modifyUpcomingTrip
interfaces.description: Modify an upcoming trip, such as changing the pickup time and upgrading or downgrading the vehicle class.

parameters.name: tripId
parameters.description: Upcoming trip to modify.

parameters.name: newPickupDatetime
parameters.description: Updated pickup datetime in ISO format, if changing from original.

parameters.name: newVehicleCategory
parameters.description: Updated vehicle category, e.g., 'standard' instead of 'economy'.

interfaces.name: cancelUpcomingTrip
interfaces.description: Cancel an upcoming trip, choose a cancellation reason, and select a refund method such as wallet credit.

parameters.name: tripId
parameters.description: Upcoming trip to cancel.

parameters.name: cancellationReason
parameters.description: Reason for cancellation.

parameters.name: cancellationReasonText
parameters.description: Additional details if cancellationReason is 'other'.

parameters.name: refundMethod
parameters.description: Selected refund method for any eligible refund.

walletTransaction.description: Wallet transaction created if refundMethod is wallet_credit and a credit was applied.

interfaces.name: getWalletSummary
interfaces.description: Get a summary of the user's wallet balance, used when choosing wallet credit as a refund or payment method.

interfaces.name: getRecentTripsForSupport
interfaces.description: Get a list of recent trips (completed and upcoming) to be used when reporting a support issue.

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Maximum number of trips to return.

interfaces.name: getSupportTopicsAndIssues
interfaces.description: Get available support topics and issue types for the Help & Support page.

interfaces.name: createSupportTicketForTrip
interfaces.description: Create a new support ticket related to a specific trip, such as a billing issue or fare problem.

parameters.name: tripId
parameters.description: Trip the issue is about; may be omitted for general questions.

parameters.name: description
parameters.description: User-provided description of the problem.

interfaces.name: getSupportTicketDetails
interfaces.description: Get details for a specific support ticket along with a summary of the related trip, if any.

parameters.name: ticketId
parameters.description: Support ticket to display.

trip.description: Related trip summary if the ticket is associated with a trip.

interfaces.name: getSupportMessages
interfaces.description: Get the message history for a support ticket to display in in-site chat or message view.

parameters.name: ticketId
parameters.description: Support ticket whose messages to load.

interfaces.name: sendSupportMessage
interfaces.description: Send a new message in an existing support ticket conversation (used for in-app chat or messaging).

parameters.name: ticketId
parameters.description: Support ticket to send the message to.

parameters.name: content
parameters.description: Message text content.

interfaces.name: getAboutContent
interfaces.description: Get content for the About page, including background information, service areas, operating hours, and general contact details.

interfaces.name: getFaqContent
interfaces.description: Get the FAQ content including questions and answers about booking, pricing, promo codes, cancellations, and wallet usage.

relatedLinks.description: Links to related pages such as My Trips or Help & Support identified by route keys.

interfaces.name: getTermsAndConditionsContent
interfaces.description: Get the full terms and conditions text for the Terms & Conditions page.

interfaces.name: getPrivacyPolicyContent
interfaces.description: Get the Privacy Policy content explaining data collection, storage, sharing, and user privacy rights.

helperFunctions.name: _getOrCreateCurrentRideSearch
helperFunctions.description: Internal helper to get or create the current RideSearch for the single active user session based on latest search parameters.

helperFunctions.name: _applyFiltersAndSortingToRideOptions
helperFunctions.description: Internal helper to apply category, capacity, accessibility filters, promo codes, and sorting to ride options for the current search.

helperFunctions.name: _createBookingDraftFromRideOption
helperFunctions.description: Internal helper to create or update a booking draft when a ride option is selected.

helperFunctions.name: _finalizeBookingDraftToTrip
helperFunctions.description: Internal helper to validate payment, apply promotions, and persist a Trip from the current booking draft.

helperFunctions.name: _getOrCreateWallet
helperFunctions.description: Internal helper to fetch or create the Wallet associated with the current user for wallet payments and refunds.

helperFunctions.name: _createWalletTransactionForRefund
helperFunctions.description: Internal helper to create a WalletTransaction when a cancellation results in wallet credit.

helperFunctions.name: _appendSupportMessage
helperFunctions.description: Internal helper to append a SupportMessage to a SupportTicket and update lastMessagePreview.
